name: Shradha Infraprojects Limited
summary: Shradha Infraprojects Limited, a real estate construction company, engages in the real estate development business in India. It is involved in the construction of commercial complexes, residential houses, and business premises or civil works, as well as deals in real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Shradha Infraprojects (Nagpur) Limited and changed its name to Shradha Infraprojects Limited. Shradha Infraprojects Limited was incorporated in 1997 and is based in Nagpur, India.
